title: THE GETAWAY -Part One-
overview: For Leocadio, it is the exciting first day of his job as an imperial soldier. For truck driver Innumael, it's just another ordinary day of deliveries. However, a smuggling group's actions set them down a path that will change their lives and the empire.

title: THE GETAWAY -Part Two-
overview: Innumael and the members of Headkeeper escape their encounter with Leocadio's squad and head for a nearby safehouse. However, the Imperial Army is closing in on their location. Can they slip out of the Imperial Army's grasp?

title: Of Creatures and Men
overview: Innumael, Schaake, and company have escaped the Imperial Army's lockdown. Their journey takes them through a forest, but something is amiss. Helman takes a new approach in his attempt to apprehend Innumael.

title: Live with Honor, Die with No Pride
overview: While Innumael, Schaake, and company continue on toward Gutheil, Elfriede discovers where Headkeeper's money is going, and who is getting it. The Empire begins preparing for a major operation.

title: From Gutheil with Love
overview: Once in Gutheil, Innumael, Schaake, and company must prepare for what comes next. Helman prepares to set his scheme in motion.

title: Rogue Infiltration
overview: Innumael, Arnolt, and Benjamin arrive at the capital to find they'll be participating in a rescue operation. However, the Diet and the military have already set their plans in motion.

title: Rogue Operation
overview: With monsters running loose in the city, will the members of Headkeeper be able to escape the Empire's operation? In the chaos, Helman closes in on Innumael. Meanwhile, Mary Bult's and the Emperor's plans move forward.

title: Rogue Ultimatum
overview: Conrad and Innumael attempt to find a way to the surface, but Helman has other plans for Innumael.

title: State of the Empire
overview: Innumael, Schaake, and company make their way to the new capital. Meanwhile, Leocadio finds a new ally investigating whether Innumael's theory about the experiments is true.

title: Break Free
overview: Innumael, Schaake, and company meet with Georg of the Holy Knights. After his time in solitary, Leocadio must find a way to escape the prison.

title: An Inconvenient Prophecy
overview: Leocadio meets back up with Innumael and the others. The gang must try to avert the Anti-imperialists plot before disaster strikes.

title: The Hand that Rocks the Cradle
overview: As Schaake confronts her father, the prophecy comes to fruition.
